ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "product_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "line_description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_statuses" (
  "product_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the product status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently in stock */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last checked */,
  "expected_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next restock */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product in days */,
  "quantity_on_order" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently on order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the order */,
  "order_total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "order_shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "order_shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "order_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "order_tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_key" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "order_detail_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the order detail */,
  "order_detail_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the specific product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_company" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  "customer_country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "customer_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "customer_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "customer_loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)
